title: Add --minify --sourcemap=inline to esbuild scripts
description: Update build, build:node, build:stdio, build:http, build:http-simple (if not deleted) to include --minify and --sourcemap=inline. This will reduce bundle size by 2-3x. Also enable --tree-shaking where possible. After change, run `bun run build:all` and compare dist/ sizes before/after.
validation: Read package.json, confirm --minify --sourcemap in all esbuild calls. Run `bun run build:all` and verify dist/ size shrunk.
